name: Soothe the Dead
descs:
Turn Start: This Gift activates for the whole Encounter when 5 or more Identities have Attack Skills that apply [Combustion] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Burn'. (except E.G.O Skills; except Backup Units)

Inflict 3 [Combustion] Count to all enemies and randomly inflict a total of 15 [Combustion] Potency between all enemies (or all Abnormality parts; once per wave)

To Skills that inflict [Combustion] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Burn': Final Power +1, Coin Power +1, inflicted [Combustion] Potency +1, inflicted [Combustion] Count +1.

When winning a Clash with a Skill that inflicts [Combustion] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Burn', inflict (# of remaining Coins + 1) [Combustion] Potency to the target enemy.
